calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing on petition changing name. Petitioner is sworn and examined. The Court grants the decree changing the petitioner's name to Celestino R. Ellington. Decree signed.
